text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Huff... Huff... I can't believe she's this strong!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: There is only one explanation for why I prevailed against you in this competition—it's because I raced you now.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
According to past data, a classic racer has never
won the Takarazuka Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
As for why that is, the classic year is the midpoint
of our development. That goes for you too.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
In summation, I had an undeniable advantage. I
cannot attribute today's victory to a true
difference in ability.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Therefore, in a year's time, I want to race you
again.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Only then, after we race again, can I truly say
that I've beaten you.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Fine. You better not try to get out of it. Next time, I will overtake you.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Haha, I won't back out. I'm the one challenging
you, after all.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
So when that time comes, do your best to keep
up.
